'''''Courage''''' was a [[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat]] owned by the [[New Jedi Order]].

In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], it was used by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] to travel to [[Belkadan/Legends|Belkadan]] to investigate the [[Extragalactic Society|ExGal]] facility there. Finding the facility virtually ruined, and all technology destroyed, the two subsequently found a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] camp. Jacen, believing he was being led by [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], tried to rescue the slaves. Instead, he was captured and implanted with a [[Yorik-Kul|slave seed]]. Luke Skywalker, however, managed to rescue him and the two escaped the planet.

The ''Courage'' would later be used as part of the ground defenses at the [[Battle of Dantooine (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Dantooine]].
